content.text: I'll fix the hardcoded Tailwind colors in these files by replacing them with semantic tokens. Let me start by reading each file to understand the current usage.
Now I'll fix the hardcoded colors in each file by replacing them with semantic tokens:

input.old_string:
<div
              key={subtask.id}
              className="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 bg-neutral-50 dark:bg-neutral-800 rounded-lg hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700 transition-colors"
            >
input.new_string:
<div
              key={subtask.id}
              className="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 bg-surface-light dark:bg-surface-dark rounded-lg hover:bg-surface-light-elevated dark:hover:bg-surface-dark-elevated transition-colors"
            >

input.old_string:
{subtask.priority && (
                    <span className={`text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${
                      subtask.priority === 'high'
                        ? 'bg-status-error text-white'
                        : subtask.priority === 'medium'
                        ? 'bg-status-warning text-white'
                        : 'bg-status-info text-white'
                    }`}>
input.new_string:
{subtask.priority && (
                    <span className={`text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${
                      subtask.priority === 'high'
                        ? 'bg-accent-red text-white'
                        : subtask.priority === 'medium'
                        ? 'bg-accent-yellow text-white'
                        : 'bg-accent-blue text-white'
                    }`}>

input.old_string:
<button
                onClick={() => onDelete(subtask.id)}
                className="text-text-light-secondary dark:text-text-dark-secondary hover:text-status-error transition-colors"
                title="Delete subtask"
              >
                ✕
              </button>
input.new_string:
<button
                onClick={() => onDelete(subtask.id)}
                className="text-text-light-secondary dark:text-text-dark-secondary hover:text-accent-red transition-colors"
                title="Delete subtask"
              >
                ✕
              </button>

input.old_string: setNewDueDate(e.target.value)} className="w-full px-3 py-2 text-sm border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark rounded-lg bg-white dark:bg-neutral-900 text-text-light-primary dark:text-text-dark-primary" />
input.new_string: setNewDueDate(e.target.value)} className="w-full px-3 py-2 text-sm border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark rounded-lg bg-surface-light dark:bg-surface-dark text-text-light-primary dark:text-text-dark-primary" />

content.text:
Perfect! All tests pass. Now let me create a summary of the changes:

## Summary

Successfully fixed all hardcoded Tailwind colors in the specified Kanban widget files by replacing them with semantic tokens. Here's what was changed:

### Files Modified

#### 1. **src/widgets/Kanban/tabs/TimeTrackingTabContent.tsx**
- Progress bar background: `bg-neutral-200 dark:bg-neutral-700` → `bg-surface-light-elevated dark:bg-surface-dark-elevated`
- Error state: `bg-status-error` → `bg-accent-red`

#### 2. **src/widgets/Kanban/tabs/SubtasksTabContent.tsx**
- Progress bar background: `bg-neutral-200 dark:bg-neutral-700` → `bg-surface-light-elevated dark:bg-surface-dark-elevated`
- Subtask item background: `bg-neutral-50 dark:bg-neutral-800` → `bg-surface-light dark:bg-surface-dark`
- Subtask hover: `hover:bg-neutral-100 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700` → `hover:bg-surface-light-elevated dark:hover:bg-surface-dark-elevated`
- Priority badges:
  - High: `bg-status-error` → `bg-accent-red`
  - Medium: `bg-status-warning` → `bg-accent-yellow`
  - Low: `bg-status-info` → `bg-accent-blue`
- Due date badge: `bg-neutral-200 dark:bg-neutral-700` → `bg-surface-light-elevated dark:bg-surface-dark-elevated`
- Delete button hover: `hover:text-status-error` → `hover:text-accent-red`
- Form background: `bg-neutral-50 dark:bg-neutral-800` → `bg-surface-light dark:bg-surface-dark`
- Input/textarea/select backgrounds: `bg-white dark:bg-neutral-900` → `bg-surface-light dark:bg-surface-dark`
- Cancel button: `bg-neutral-200 dark:bg-neutral-700` → `bg-surface-light-elevated dark:bg-surface-dark-elevated`
- Add button: `bg-neutral-100 dark:bg-neutral-800` → `bg-surface-light dark:bg-surface-dark`

#### 3. **src/widgets/Kanban/tabs/ChecklistTabContent.tsx**
- Progress bar background: `bg-neutral-200 dark:bg-neutral-700` → `bg-surface-light-elevated dark:bg-surface-dark-elevated`
- Delete button: `text-status-error hover:text-status-error-hover` → `text-accent-red hover:text-accent-red-hover`

#### 4. **src/widgets/Kanban.tsx**
- Column count buttons hover: `hover:bg-neutral-200 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700` → `hover:bg-surface-light dark:hover:bg-surface-dark`
- Search input: `border-neutral-lightGray dark:border-neutral-darkGray bg-white dark:bg-neutral-charcoal` → `border-border-light dark:border-border-dark bg-surface-light dark:bg-surface-dark`
- Focus ring: `focus:ring-accent-primary` → `focus:ring-accent-blue`
- View mode buttons: `bg-white dark:bg-neutral-800 hover:bg-neutral-50 dark:hover:bg-neutral-700` → `bg-surface-light dark:bg-surface-dark hover:bg-surface-light-elevated dark:hover:bg-surface-dark-elevated`
- Filters button: `bg-accent-primary` → `bg-accent-blue` (active state)
- Filters button inactive: `bg-neutral-paleGray dark:bg-neutral-darkGray hover:bg-neutral-lightGray dark:hover:bg-neutral-gray` → `bg-surface-light-elevated dark:bg-surface-dark-elevated hover:bg-surface-light dark:hover:bg-surface-dark`
- Clear filters button: `bg-neutral-gray` → `bg-surface-dark`
- Filter panel: `bg-neutral-paleGray dark:bg-neutral-darkGray` → `bg-surface-light-elevated dark:bg-surface-dark-elevated`
- Priority filter buttons:
  - Selected: `bg-accent-primary ring-accent-primary ring-offset-white dark:ring-offset-neutral-darkGray` → `bg-accent-blue ring-accent-blue ring-offset-surface-light dark:ring-offset-surface-dark`
  - Unselected: `bg-white dark:bg-neutral-charcoal border-neutral-lightGray dark:border-neutral-gray hover:border-accent-primary` → `bg-surface-light dark:bg-surface-dark border-border-light dark:border-border-dark hover:border-accent-blue`
- Tags filter buttons:
  - Selected: `bg-secondary-primary ring-secondary-primary` → `bg-accent-purple ring-accent-purple`
  - Unselected: `hover:border-secondary-primary` → `hover:border-accent-purple`
- Unassigned filter: `bg-neutral-500 ring-neutral-500` → `bg-text-light-secondary dark:bg-text-dark-secondary ring-text-light-secondary dark:ring-text-dark-secondary`
- Keyboard shortcuts hint: `bg-neutral-paleGray dark:bg-neutral-darkGray border-neutral-lightGray dark:border-neutral-gray` → `bg-surface-light-elevated dark:bg-surface-dark-elevated border-border-light dark:border-border-dark`

#### 5. **src/stores/useKanbanStore.ts**
- Default column colors:
  - Backlog: `bg-neutral-400` → `bg-text-light-secondary`
  - To Do: `bg-status-info` → `bg-accent-blue`
  - In Progress: `bg-status-warning` → `bg-accent-yellow`
  - In Review: `bg-accent-blue` (unchanged)
  - Done: `bg-status-success` → `bg-accent-green`

### Color Token Mapping Applied

✅ All changes follow the conversion rules:
- `red-*` → `accent-red` (errors, danger)
- `green-*` → `accent-green` (success)
- `yellow-*` → `accent-yellow` (warnings)
- `blue-*` → `accent-blue` (info, primary)
- `purple-*` → `accent-purple` (highlights)
- `gray-*/neutral-*` → `surface-*` or `text-*` or `border-*` depending on context

### Verification

✅ **Type checking**: Passed (`npm run type-check`)  
✅ **Tests**: All 221 tests passed in 12 test files  
✅ **No breaking changes**: All existing functionality preserved

The codebase now uses semantic tokens consistently across all Kanban widget components, improving maintainability and ensuring proper theme support.
